title: Verify the display of posts in the 'Animals & Nature' thread
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Animals & Nature' thread. | Verify that all posts, including user names, timestamps, images, and text content, are displayed correctly.
expected_result: All posts are displayed with correct user names, timestamps, images, and text content.

title: Verify the functionality of the 'REPLY' button
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Animals & Nature' thread. | Click on the 'REPLY' button next to the first post. | Verify that the reply form is displayed.
expected_result: The reply form is displayed correctly.

title: Verify the display of replies in the 'Animals & Nature' thread
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Animals & Nature' thread. | Click on the 'REPLY' button next to the first post. | Enter a reply and submit it. | Verify that the reply is displayed in the thread.
expected_result: The reply is displayed correctly in the thread.

title: Verify the functionality of the navigation tabs
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Animals & Nature' thread. | Click on the 'BOARDS' tab. | Click on the '/AN/2306630' tab. | Verify that the correct thread is displayed.
expected_result: The correct thread is displayed in the '/AN/2306630' tab.

title: Verify data persistence when navigating away from the thread
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Animals & Nature' thread. | Navigate away from the thread to another screen. | Navigate back to the 'Animals & Nature' thread. | Verify that the thread is still displayed with the same posts.
expected_result: The thread is still displayed with the same posts.

title: Verify accessibility/usability of the 'REPLY' button
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Animals & Nature' thread. | Click on the 'REPLY' button next to the first post. | Verify that the reply form is accessible and usable.
expected_result: The reply form is accessible and usable.

title: Verify interruption/resume functionality
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Animals & Nature' thread. | Click on the 'REPLY' button next to the first post. | Simulate an interruption (e.g., phone call, notification). | Resume the app and verify that the reply form is still displayed.
expected_result: The reply form is still displayed after resuming the app.
